title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.687 - Court may order videotaped reexamination, when
text:
491.687.  Court may order videotaped reexamination, when. — At any time prior to trial, and for good cause shown, the court may, upon motion of any party, order a videotaped reexamination of the child where the interests of justice so require.
(L. 1985 H.B. 366, et al. § 11) 
Effective 7-19-85
